# creator-intelligence — Full Details

**Parent:** `creator-intelligence/SKILL.md`

**Auto-generated by Context Diet:** 2026-03-13

**This file contains the full specification. SKILL.md is the routing card.**


## Two Databases, Same Pipeline

| Database | Who Goes In | Extra Fields |
|----------|-------------|-------------|
| **Creator Intelligence** | Creators the user follows for inspiration/learning | Course extractions, teaching style |
| **Client Intelligence** | Viral Editz clients we work with | Raw files access, our edits, wins tracking |

Same extraction pipeline. Clients get additional tracking for our own work.

---


### What To Pull

```bash
# Use Apify Instagram Scraper actor
# Pull: all posts (reels, carousels, images, stories if available)
# Data per post:
# - Post URL, type (reel/carousel/image/story)
# - Caption text, hashtags
# - Views, likes, comments, shares (if available)
# - Posted date/time
# - Audio (original vs trending)
# - Duration (for reels)
# - Thumbnail URL
```


### Engagement Scoring

For each post, calculate:
```
Engagement Rate = (likes + comments + shares) / followers * 100
Performance Tier:
  - S-Tier: Top 10% by views/engagement
  - A-Tier: Top 25%
  - B-Tier: Top 50%
  - C-Tier: Bottom 50%
```


### Naming Convention
```
~/.claude/scratchpad/creator-intelligence/
  └── @handle/
      ├── metadata.json          (full Apify scrape)
      ├── performance.csv        (sorted post performance)
      ├── videos/
      │   ├── VIDEO_ID_1.mp4
      │   ├── VIDEO_ID_1.json    (metadata)
      │   ├── VIDEO_ID_2.mp4
      │   └── ...
      ├── frames/
      │   ├── VIDEO_ID_1/
      │   │   ├── frame_001.jpg
      │   │   ├── frame_002.jpg
      │   │   └── ...
      │   └── ...
      ├── transcripts/
      │   ├── VIDEO_ID_1.txt
      │   └── ...
      └── analysis/
          ├── VIDEO_ID_1_analysis.md
          └── ...
```

---


### 3c. Visual Reading (AI Cookbook Protocol)
- Read key frames visually (first, middle, last + any with text overlays)
- Extract: text on screen, B-roll type, camera angle, lighting, setting
- Note transitions, zoom-ins, split screens, green screens


### Format & Style
- **Video Format:** [Solo Talking Head / Podcast / Street Interview / Greenscreen / B-Roll / Voiceover / Screen Record / Two People]
- **Camera Setup:** [Direct to Camera / Side Angle / Walking / Sitting / Multiple Angles]
- **Aspect Ratio:** [9:16 / 1:1 / 4:5]
- **Editing Style:**
  - Cut frequency: [Fast/Medium/Slow — avg seconds between cuts]
  - Text overlays: [Yes/No — style: bold white, yellow highlight, minimal, animated]
  - Zoom effects: [Yes/No — frequency]
  - B-roll: [Yes/No — type]
  - Transitions: [Jump cut / Smooth / Match cut / None]
  - Music: [Yes/No — type]
  - Sound effects: [Yes/No — frequency]


### New Databases Needed

#### 1. Creator Intelligence DB (Machine Layer)
**Properties:**
| Property | Type | Purpose |
|----------|------|---------|
| Creator Name | Title | @handle + real name |
| Platform | Select | Instagram / TikTok / YouTube |
| Follower Count | Number | Current following |
| Niche/Industry | Multi-select | AI, Business, Fitness, etc. |
| Content Style | Multi-select | Solo / Podcast / Street / Tutorial |
| Posting Frequency | Select | Daily / 3-5x week / Weekly |
| Avg Views | Number | Average views last 30 days |
| Top Topic Categories | Multi-select | What topics perform best |
| Editing DNA | Rich text | Summary of their editing signature |
| CMF Profile | Relation | Link to their Content Market Fit entries |
| Has Course | Checkbox | Do we have their course extracted? |
| Comparable To | Relation | Self-relation: similar creators |
| Layer | Select | Underground / Machine / Surface |
| Last Scraped | Date | When we last updated their data |
| Change Log | Rich text | Dated log of all updates |

#### 2. Video Deconstruction DB (Machine Layer)
**Properties:**
| Property | Type | Purpose |
|----------|------|---------|
| Video Title | Title | First line or hook |
| Creator | Relation | → Creator Intelligence DB |
| URL | URL | Instagram post URL |
| Posted Date | Date | When published |
| Duration | Number | Seconds |
| Views | Number | View count |
| Likes | Number | Like count |
| Comments | Number | Comment count |
| Engagement Rate | Number | Calculated ER% |
| Performance Tier | Select | S / A / B / C |
| Hook Text | Rich text | Exact opening words |
| Hook Type | Select | Question / Bold Claim / Pattern Interrupt / Story / Stat / Controversy |
| Topic Category | Multi-select | Main topic tags |
| Evergreen | Select | E / D / T |
| Script | Rich text | Full transcription |
| Video Format | Select | Solo / Podcast / Street / Greenscreen / B-Roll / Voiceover / Two People |
| Camera Setup | Select | Direct / Side / Walking / Sitting / Multi-angle |
| Editing Style | Rich text | Cut frequency, overlays, effects |
| CTA Type | Select | Comment / Follow / Link / Share / Save / None |
| Emotion Arc | Rich text | Open → Peak → Close |
| CMF Corner | Select | YOU / AUDIENCE / OFFER |
| Recreate Script | Rich text | Generalized template |
| Image Gen Prompt | Rich text | Nano Banana Pro prompt |
| Video Gen Prompt | Rich text | Higgsfield/Kling prompt |
| Change Log | Rich text | Dated log |

#### 3. Hook Swipe File (DEFERRED — Not a separate DB yet)

Per Dave Gate: Hooks are already captured as properties in Video Deconstruction DB (Hook Text, Hook Type fields). Only promote to a standalone database if the user finds himself querying hooks independently and the embedded fields aren't sufficient. Until then, filter Video Deconstruction DB by Hook Type to get the same result without extra architecture overhead.

**Promotion Trigger:** If the user asks "give me all question hooks across all creators" more than 3 times, build the dedicated Hook Swipe File DB at that point.

---


### Queries You Can Run

| Query | What It Returns |
|-------|----------------|
| "What's working for @X in last 30 days?" | Top performing videos, topics, hooks from recent posts |
| "Give me @X's top 5 hooks" | Best hooks by views, with templates |
| "What format does @X use most?" | Format breakdown with performance by format |
| "Write me a script in @X's style on [topic]" | Script using their framework, hook style, CTA pattern |
| "Compare @X to @Y" | Side-by-side CMF profiles, style differences, what each does better |
| "What topics work for [industry] creators?" | Aggregated across all creators in that niche |
| "Show me all S-Tier podcast-style videos" | Filtered across all creators |
| "What hook type gets the most views?" | Aggregated hook type performance |
| "Find me a video to clone for [client]" | Match by niche, format, style, personality |

---


### Client-Specific Tracking

| Field | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| **Filmed By Us** | Checkbox — did Viral Editz film this? |
| **Edited By Us** | Checkbox — did Viral Editz edit this? |
| **Raw File Path** | Text — where the raw footage lives |
| **Before/After** | Rich text — raw footage vs final edit comparison |
| **Editing Style Used** | Rich text — what editing decisions we made |
| **Client Approved** | Checkbox — did the client approve before posting? |
| **Our Win** | Checkbox — video performed above their average |


### Client Comparison Engine

Every client gets matched to 2-5 comparable creators/clients:

**Matching Criteria:**
- Industry (dental, real estate, coaching, etc.)
- Business structure (solo, husband-wife, family, team)
- Audience demographics (age, income, location)
- Personality type (high energy, calm authority, humor-driven)
- Content style (podcast, direct-to-camera, B-roll heavy)
- Lifestyle (work from home, office, travel, family)
- Revenue stage ($0-100K, $100K-500K, $500K-1M, $1M+)

**What Comparisons Unlock:**
- "Topics that work for husband-wife founders in dental"
- "Editing style that performs best for [personality type]"
- "This creator's audience overlaps with your ideal client"
- "This hook formula works for your niche — proven by these 5 creators"

---


## Execution Checklist

When given an Instagram handle, execute in order:

- [ ] Run Apify scrape → save to scratchpad
- [ ] Calculate engagement rates, sort by performance, identify tiers
- [ ] Download S-tier and A-tier videos (top 20-30)
- [ ] For each video: extract frames, transcribe, visual read
- [ ] For each video: run Hume (if available) and Twelve Labs (if available)
- [ ] For each video: fill out Video Deconstruction Card
- [ ] Extract hooks → Hook Swipe File
- [ ] Extract frameworks → Master Frameworks (dedup check)
- [ ] Run Content Market Fit extraction (Mode 2: Scrape)
- [ ] Create Creator Intelligence entry in Notion
- [ ] Create all Video Deconstruction entries in Notion
- [ ] Create Hook Swipe File entries in Notion
- [ ] Identify 2-5 comparable creators
- [ ] Generate aggregated report (top topics, formats, hooks, style DNA)
- [ ] Report complete with Notion links

---


## Integration Points

| System | How Creator Intelligence Plugs In |
|--------|----------------------------------|
| **Content Market Fit** | CMF is the extraction template for each creator's profile |
| **Viral Accelerator** | Top topics per industry feed the 90-topic generation |
| **Clipper Skill** | Hook patterns inform clipping decisions |
| **NRVES Pipeline** | Editing style DNA informs editing direction |
| **Image Generation** | Visual style extracted for each creator |
| **Clone System** | Full CMF + style DNA = clone blueprint |
| **AI Cookbook** | Video analysis pipeline (frames + transcription) |
| **Video Intelligence** | Hume + Twelve Labs analysis layer |

---


## Performance Tracking Over Time

Re-scrape creators monthly (or on-demand) to track:
- Algorithm changes (what used to work vs what works now)
- Topic trend shifts
- Format evolution
- Engagement rate changes
- New frameworks/methods they're teaching

Store as time-series in Change Log:
```
2026-02-06: Initial scrape. 150 posts analyzed. Top format: Solo talking head (65%). Top topic: AI tools (40%). Avg views: 85K. S-tier threshold: 200K+.
2026-03-06: Re-scrape. Format shift: Podcast style now 30% (up from 10%). AI tools still dominant. Avg views: 92K (+8%).
```

---
